repair_history.diagnosis: missing EOF at 'annex': nested annex blocks -> remove inner annex block
Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations: Assign statements are in component type annex -> Move assign statements to component implementation annex
Mulitiple assignments to variable 'tempout': Multiple assign statements for the same output -> Remove one of the assign statements for tempout

Assignment statements are allowed only in component implementations: Assignment statements are not allowed in component type annexes -> Move the assignment statements from the component type annex to the component implementation annex
